name: Wheel Unseen
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Keyflare Cap +100%. Hand Limit +2, cannot stack with other WoDs with the same effect. Increases the wielder's Keyflare Regen by [StateArg1]%. After the wielder plays a card, in this turn, the Crit. Rate, Crit. DMG, Shield Generation, Aliemus Generation, and {STR} Generation of the wielder's Command Cards +[StateArg2]%, stacking up to 5 times.
